description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop with a slatted design, supported by a sturdy black metal frame. Two matching benches, also constructed from slatted wood and metal, run parallel to the longer sides of the table, providing ample seating. The wood appears to be stained a rich, dark brown, giving the set a classic and durable look suitable for outdoor environments. The metal legs are straight and robust, ensuring stability and resistance to tipping. There are no visible decorative elements, focusing on functionality and clean lines. The table does not have an umbrella hole, and the benches are detached, allowing flexible arrangement.
description: A rectangular, slatted wood picnic table with two matching benches and a black metal frame, designed for outdoor use. The benches are detached and the set has a classic, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted tabletop and one bench in front, highlighting the parallel alignment and sturdy metal legs.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view displaying the full tabletop surface and both benches, emphasizing the rectangular shape and seating arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the slatted tabletop and the opposite bench visible, showing symmetry in design.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view from the opposite side, again showing the tabletop and both benches, with clear visibility of the wood grain and metal frame.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four straight metal legs at each corner, connected by a rectangular metal frame beneath the wood slats for added stability.
